trivia_bullets.text: Theros Beyond Death (THB, January 24 2020) is the 84th Magic expansion, returning to the Greek-mythos plane of Theros with a focus on the Underworld and Elspeth's death-and-resurrection arc. THB introduced the Escape mechanic and returned Constellation.

Daybreak Chimera is a 3/3 flyer with base cost {3}{W}{W} that reduces by devotion to white. The devotion mechanic first appeared in the original Theros (2013) and returned as a full-set throughline, treating faith as a measurable game-altering resource.

Rated B by Hipsters of the Coast's THB common review: 'A 3/3 flying for five doesn't cut it anymore...but Daybreak Chimera looks awesome,' noting casting it alongside another spell for two mana provided strong tempo.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Every Common in Theros Beyond Death Reviewed

trivia_bullets.text: On Theros, chimeras are multi-part creatures considered children of Nyx, the divine dreamscape that manifests the gods' will. This chimera's goat-and-eagle body echoes Theros's white-aligned connection to the heavens and Heliod's sun-domain.

related_cards.name: Loathsome Chimera
related_cards.note: Another THB chimera sharing the Chimera creature type

related_cards.name: Mischievous Chimera
related_cards.note: Blue-aligned THB chimera, part of the Flash-matters archetype

related_cards.name: Treeshaker Chimera
related_cards.note: Green THB chimera; together the three form a cross-color chimera presence

related_cards.name: Heliod, Sun-Crowned
related_cards.note: White devotion payoff god; Daybreak Chimera's devotion mechanic directly feeds Heliod's power and toughness
